notes: Public GitHub repository with TrajNet++ original trajectory subsets.
Stage 5B uses the BIWI/ETH-style subset bundled in the TrajNet++ repository when present.
Public Socrata CSV sample used as an additional TGSIM corridor benchmark.
Stanford Drone Dataset requires license-aware manual preparation; not downloaded by default.
OpenDD access and license must be verified by the user before local conversion.
NGSIM source files must be supplied by the user or an official allowed portal.
